task: AIP-001: 数据库模型 + 迁移(0071) + Fernet 加密 + Pydantic schemas

details.encryption: Fernet symmetric encryption with PBKDF2HMAC key derivation from master key
details.models: AIProviderConfig + AccountAIProviderOverride (30 lines, UUID PK, encrypted api_key, priority, is_enabled, account overrides)
details.schemas: 8 Pydantic schemas: Create/Update/Response for config, Reorder, Override, TestConnection
